problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Polymer. Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
